caption: In a spacious, brightly lit hall with ornate chandeliers and a blue carpeted floor, a group of people are practicing martial arts. A man in a blue traditional Chinese tunic and pants is the central figure, performing a series of fluid, controlled movements. He is surrounded by other practitioners; some wear white uniforms, and others wear black or red. In the background, a crowd of spectators is seated at tables, watching the demonstration. Throughout the sequence, the man in blue shifts his weight and extends his arms in choreographed motions, transitioning from a wide stance with his arm raised to a more centered position with his hand extended outward. The other practitioners move in synchronization or perform their own forms behind him, maintaining a focused demeanor. The setting remains consistent across the frames, with the lighting and background elements unchanging as the martial arts demonstration progresses.
